subject: Whismur, a small round pink Pokemon with large ears, mouth wide open in a cry or shout, outdoors among vegetation
description: A small, round lavender-pink Pokemon stands in an outdoor grassy setting with plants or bushes in the background. Its most prominent feature is its very wide-open mouth in a full cry or yell, conveying distress or alarm. Large floppy ear-like appendages hang on either side of its round head. The background is a soft green and tan natural environment with diffuse natural lighting. The creature is the clear center of the composition, and its open-mouth expression dominates the scene.
foreground: Round pink Pokemon with wide-open mouth and large floppy ears
background: Grassy outdoor scene with soft green and tan tones
